RAF responding to suspected drone strike at UK base in Cyprus, MoD saysThe BBC understands there were no casualties in the suspected strike on RAF Akrotiri. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cm2r0q310e3o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cm2r0q310e3o#1 Mon, 02 Mar 2026 01:50:21 GMT
UK will allow US to use bases to strike Iranian missile sites, PM saysThe prime minister says it remains the case that the UK will "not join offensive action now". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cqj9g11p1ezo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cqj9g11p1ezo#1 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 22:56:45 GMT
Iran's regime is still intact - the coming days will show if it can hold outIran's surviving leaders are in crisis mode, battling to project security as US and Israel strikes continue. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2lgvg5rl1o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2lgvg5rl1o#1 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 18:05:06 GMT
Watch: Retaliations continue on day two of US-Israel attacks on IranDonald Trump warned of more US deaths after three US service members have been killed in action on the second day of US-Israel attack on Iran. https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/cvgk8vj56v1o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/cvgk8vj56v1o#1 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 23:18:27 GMT
Oil prices jump after ships attacked near Strait of HormuzExperts have warned that a prolonged conflict could push global energy prices even higher. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c75evve6l63o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c75evve6l63o#1 Mon, 02 Mar 2026 00:36:19 GMT
UK mounts operation to support thousands of Britons in Middle EastOfficials are understood to be working on plans to evacuate British nationals, should airspace remain closed. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cdjm8pn0ld8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cdjm8pn0ld8o#2 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 22:21:33 GMT
Major changes to asylum system set to come into forceFrom Monday, asylum seekers granted refugee status in the UK will be offered only temporary protection. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cp32ddzdjxko?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cp32ddzdjxko#2 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 22:04:54 GMT
Deadly Texas bar shooting 'potentially act of terrorism', FBI saysTwo people were killed and 14 injured, with the suspected gunman, identified by some media outlets, also shot dead. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cgjznzgly0po?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cgjznzgly0po#2 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 23:17:32 GMT

After the warmest weather of the year so far, is winter finally over?As we start meteorological spring, Simon King explores whether it is time to put away your winter coat. https://www.bbc.com/weather/articles/c1d6q1l5r6do?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/weather/articles/c1d6q1l5r6do#2 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 10:04:21 GMT
